description: A flaw was found in a change made to path normalization in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49. An attacker could use a path traversal attack to map URLs to files outside the directories configured by Alias-like directives.

In PHP versions 7.1.x below 7.1.33, 7.2.x below 7.2.24 and 7.3.x below 7.3.11 in certain configurations of FPM setup it is possible to cause FPM module to write past allocated buffers into the space reserved for FCGI protocol data, thus opening the possibility of remote code execution.
HTTP headers eat all memory leading to Denial of Service.
Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing unauthenticated remote code execution.

The (1) TLS and (2) DTLS implementations in OpenSSL 1.0.1 before 1.0.1g do not properly handle Heartbeat Extension packets, which allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information from process memory.

The Jakarta Multipart parser in Apache Struts 2 2.3.x before 2.3.32 and 2.5.x before 2.5.10.1 has incorrect exception handling and error-message generation during file-upload attempts, leading to RCE.
A Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux application running on JDK 9+ may be vulnerable to remote code execution (RCE) via data binding.
The SMBv1 server in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets. This is famously known as EternalBlue.

Vulnerability in the Oracle WebLogic Server product of Oracle Fusion Middleware. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server.
Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. This forms part of the ProxyShell attack chain.
GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code (Shellshock).

Race condition in mm/gup.c in the Linux kernel allows local users to gain privileges by leveraging incorrect handling of a copy-on-write (COW) feature to write to a read-only memory mapping (Dirty COW).

A local privilege escalation vulnerability was found on polkit's pkexec utility. The pkexec application is a setuid tool designed to allow unprivileged users to run commands as privileged users according to predefined policies (PwnKit).

The Traffic Management User Interface (TMUI) in F5 BIG-IP allows unauthenticated attackers, or authenticated users, with network access to the TMUI, to execute arbitrary system commands, create or delete files, and disable services.
In Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center, an unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code via an OGNL injection vulnerability.
An issue was discovered in Citrix Application Delivery Controller (ADC) and Gateway. It allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform arbitrary code execution via directory traversal.
A path traversal vulnerability in the SSL VPN web portal of the FortiOS may allow an unauthenticated attacker to download FortiOS system files through specially crafted HTTP resource requests.

When using the Apache JServ Protocol (AJP), care must be taken when trusting incoming connections to Apache Tomcat. This vulnerability allows an attacker to read any files from the web application (Ghostcat).

The vSphere Client (HTML5) contains a remote code execution vulnerability in a vCenter Server plugin. A malicious actor with network access to port 443 may exploit this issue to execute commands with unrestricted privileges on the underlying operating system.

An issue has been discovered in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions starting from 11.9. GitLab was not properly validating image files that were passed to a file parser which resulted in a remote command execution.

runc through 1.0-rc6, as used in Docker and other products, allows attackers to overwrite the host runc binary and consequently obtain host root access by leveraging the ability to execute a command as root within one of these types of containers.

Nginx versions since 0.5.6 up to and including 1.13.2 are vulnerable to integer overflow vulnerability in nginx range filter module resulting into leak of potentially sensitive information triggered by specially crafted request.

A vulnerability exists in Redis on Debian/Ubuntu due to Lua sandboxing being bypassed. An attacker can load an arbitrary Lua script and execute it to escape the sandbox and achieve Remote Code Execution.

Drupal 7.x and 8.x contain a highly critical vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code because of an issue affecting multiple subsystems with default or common module configurations (Drupalgeddon2).

In PostgreSQL 9.3 through 11.2, the COPY TO/FROM PROGRAM function allows superusers and users in the 'pg_execute_server_program' group to execute arbitrary code in the context of the database's operating system user.
Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source contain an improper input validation vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution.

The File Manager (wp-file-manager) plugin before 6.9 for WordPress allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP code because it renames an uploaded .php file to .php_.txt but still allows execution.

Jenkins 2.441 and earlier, LTS 2.426.2 and earlier does not disable a feature of its CLI command parser that replaces an '@' character followed by a file path in an argument with the file's contents, allowing unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files.
Joomla! 1.5.x through 3.4.x before 3.4.6 allow remote attackers to conduct PHP object injection attacks and execute arbitrary code via the HTTP User-Agent header.

In all Kubernetes versions prior to v1.10.11, v1.11.5, and v1.12.3, incorrect handling of error responses to proxied upgrade requests in the kube-apiserver allows specially crafted requests to establish a connection through the Kubernetes API server to backend servers.
Sudo before 1.9.5p2 has a Heap-based Buffer Overflow, allowing privilege escalation to root via sudoedit -s and a command-line argument that ends with a single backslash character (Baron Samedit).

An issue was found in Apache Airflow versions 1.10.10 and below. A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the experimental REST API. An attacker can trigger a malicious DAG to run arbitrary code.

The /plugins/servlet/gadgets/makeRequest resource in Jira before 8.4.0 allows remote attackers to access the content of internal network resources via a Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability.
Malicious code in the xz tools and libraries can allow an attacker to bypass sshd authentication and gain unauthorized access to the entire system.

A command injection vulnerability in the GlobalProtect feature of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software for specific PAN-OS versions enables an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the firewall.

In PHP versions 8.1.* before 8.1.29, 8.2.* before 8.2.20, 8.3.* before 8.3.8, when using Apache and PHP-CGI on Windows, if the system is set up to use certain code pages, Windows may use 'Best-Fit' behavior to replace characters in command line given to php-cgi.exe, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
An authentication bypass vulnerability in the web component of Ivanti ICS 9.x, 22.x and Ivanti Policy Secure allows a remote attacker to access restricted resources by bypassing control checks.

A command injection vulnerability in web components of Ivanti Connect Secure (9.x, 22.x) allows an authenticated administrator to send specially crafted requests and execute arbitrary commands on the appliance.
ConnectWise ScreenConnect 23.9.7 and prior are affected by an Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability, which may allow an attacker to gain unauthenticated access.
A vulnerability in the web UI feature of Cisco IOS XE Software could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to create an account on an affected system with privilege level 15 access.
Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway are vulnerable to sensitive information disclosure (Citrix Bleed) allowing attackers to hijack existing authenticated sessions.

In Progress MOVEit Transfer before 2021.0.6, an SQL injection vulnerability has been found in the MOVEit Transfer web application that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain unauthorized access to the database.

An issue was discovered in ownCloud owncloud/graphapi. The graphapi app relies on a third-party library that provides a URL allowing unauthenticated configuration details disclosure, including admin credentials.
An authentication bypass vulnerability in JetBrains TeamCity allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution on the server.
Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server has a Broken Access Control vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to create an administrator account and gain access to the instance.
An Improper Authorization vulnerability in Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server allows an unauthenticated attacker to reset Confluence and create a Confluence instance administrator account.
An OGNL injection vulnerability exists in Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server allowing an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution on the instance.

Internet Shortcut Files Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker could send a targeted user a specially crafted file that is designed to bypass displayed security checks (SmartScreen).

Windows TCP/IP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker could repeatedly send IPv6 packets, that include specially crafted packets, to a Windows machine which could enable remote code execution.
Windows MSHTML Platform Spoofing Vulnerability. An attacker could craft a malicious internet shortcut file that forces Windows to open a URL in Internet Explorer instead of the default browser.

Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. An attacker could send a specially crafted email that forces the victim's client to connect to an attacker-controlled SMB share and transmit NetNTLMv2 hashes.
Microsoft Outlook Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (MonikerLink). An attacker could bypass Office Protected View and open a malicious file over SMB.

RARLAB WinRAR before 6.23 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code when a user attempts to view a benign file within a ZIP archive containing a maliciously crafted payload alongside a folder with the same name.
A vulnerability in Docker Engine allows an attacker to bypass authorization plugins under certain conditions when an API request has a Content-Length of 0.
An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in FortiOS SSL VPN allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted HTTP requests.
A format string vulnerability in FortiOS fgfmd daemon allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted requests.
A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in FortiOS SSL-VPN may allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specifically crafted requests.

A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in FortiManager fgfmd daemon allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted FGFM requests.
SolarWinds Serv-U is vulnerable to a Java Deserialization vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform remote code execution.
A vulnerability in Veeam Backup Enterprise Manager allows an unauthenticated attacker to log in to the Veeam Backup Enterprise Manager web interface as any user.
An unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in Apache OFBiz allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code by passing a manipulated payload.
Jenkins 2.470 and earlier allows agent processes to read arbitrary files from the Jenkins controller file system by using the `ClassLoaderProxy#fetchJar` method.
An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in glibc iconv can lead to remote code execution when converting from ISO-2022-CN-EXT.
A signal handler race condition in OpenSSH's sshd allows unauthenticated remote code execution as root on glibc-based Linux systems (regreSSHion).
cups-browsed binds to UDP port 631 and trusts any source connecting to it. An attacker can send a crafted packet to cause the system to add a malicious printer, leading to RCE on job print.
An unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability was found in Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway due to improper input validation.

Microsoft SharePoint Server Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker who gains access to spoofed JWT authentication tokens can use them to execute a network attack and gain admin privileges.
A vulnerability in the CLI of Cisco NX-OS Software could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root on the underlying operating system.
An improper access control vulnerability in the SonicWall SonicOS management access and SSLVPN allows an unauthenticated attacker to gain unauthorized resource access or crash the firewall.
Zimbra Collaboration Suite allows unauthenticated remote code execution via a specially crafted email sent to the postjournal service.
Ignite Realtime Openfire features an administrative environment that is vulnerable to a path traversal attack, allowing unauthenticated users to access restricted admin pages.
Adobe ColdFusion versions are affected by an Improper Access Control vulnerability that could result in arbitrary file system read without authentication.
Unauthenticated remote command execution vulnerability in Progress Kemp LoadMaster allows an attacker to execute arbitrary OS commands via the management interface.
Vulnerability in the Oracle WebLogic Server allows unauthenticated attackers with network access via T3/IIOP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server, resulting in takeover.
A cryptographic flaw in Citrix ShareFile's Storage Zones Controller allows unauthenticated remote attackers to upload arbitrary files and achieve remote code execution.
An authentication bypass vulnerability in the SFTP module of Progress MOVEit Transfer allows an attacker to bypass authentication and gain unauthorized access.
An unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in Progress WhatsUp Gold allows an attacker to execute arbitrary commands via the NmPoller.exe service.

A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the Barracuda Email Security Gateway (appliance) due to improper sanitization of attachments. An attacker can format file names to execute system commands.
A use-after-free vulnerability in the Linux kernel's netfilter nf_tables component allows a local attacker to achieve privilege escalation to root.
A remote code execution vulnerability in the Android kernel's networking component allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code with high privileges.
Processing maliciously crafted web content in Apple WebKit may lead to arbitrary code execution. Apple is aware of a report that this issue may have been exploited.
Heap buffer overflow in libwebp allows a remote attacker to perform an out of bounds memory write via a crafted HTML page or image file.
Windows NTLM Hash Disclosure Vulnerability. An attacker can force a user's machine to authenticate to a rogue server, leaking the user's NTLMv2 hash with minimal interaction.
Critical unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) in React Server Components due to insecure deserialization in the react-server package.
Use-after-free weakness in Microsoft Graphics Component allowing authenticated remote attackers to elevate privileges to SYSTEM level.
Zero-click vulnerability in Windows OLE allowing remote code execution via specially crafted RTF emails without user interaction.
Untrusted data deserialization vulnerability in SolarWinds Web Help Desk enabling an attacker to run arbitrary commands with service privileges.
Deserialization of untrusted data in on-premises Microsoft SharePoint Server allowing unauthorized attackers to execute code over a network.
Buffer overflow web service vulnerability affecting Cisco Secure Firewall ASA and FTD, resulting in root-level remote code execution.
Missing authorization web service vulnerability in Cisco Secure Firewall ASA and FTD via trivial path traversal.
Critical FortiCloud SSO flaw letting attackers bypass authentication via crafted SAML messages and steal firewall configs.
Unauthenticated remote code execution enabling full infrastructure control in HPE OneView.
Critical Gogs flaw allowing arbitrary file overwrite and remote code execution via symbolic links.
SmarterMail vulnerability enabling unauthenticated file upload and arbitrary remote code execution.
WebKit bug allowing attackers to escape the Web Content sandbox on Apple devices, actively exploited in the wild.
A use of hard-coded password vulnerability in Hyper Data Protector allowing remote attackers unauthorized access.
Remote code execution flaw in Microsoft Office triggered simply by rendering a malicious document through the email preview pane.
Remote Code Execution vulnerability affecting Windows Remote Desktop Services requiring an attacker to win a race condition.
A highly prevalent remote code execution flaw in Apache Tomcat due to mishandled deployments.
Critical authentication bypass and command execution flaw affecting internet-facing Fortinet FortiVoice appliances.
Remote code execution vulnerability affecting the restConnector-2.0 feature in IBM Open Liberty.
Physical access vulnerability allowing attackers to bypass USB Restricted Mode on locked iPhones and iPads.
Critical OS Command Injection vulnerability in Array Networks ArrayOS AG appliances.
Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in Google Chromium leading to potential code execution within the browser sandbox.
Improper Handling of Length Parameter Inconsistency in MongoDB and MongoDB Server leading to denial of service or memory corruption.
Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (XXE) in OSGeo GeoServer allowing arbitrary file reads and RCE.
Path Traversal vulnerability in RARLAB WinRAR allowing attackers to write files outside intended directories.
SGLang encoder parallel disaggregation system is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution.
SGLang's replay_request_dump.py contains an insecure pickle.load() allowing critical unauthenticated remote code execution.
CRLF injection in the decodeenc() function allowing remote attackers to bypass input validation and corrupt responses.
Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the SVG Parser of GPAC requiring local access to exploit.
Authorization bypass in the Keycloak Admin API allowing authenticated users to enumerate organization memberships of others.
Heap-based buffer overflow web service vulnerability affecting Cisco Secure Firewall ASA, FTD, IOS, IOS XE, and IOS XR.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Remote Desktop Services formerly known as Terminal Services when an unauthenticated attacker connects to the target system using RDP (BlueKeep).

An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists when an attacker establishes a vulnerable Netlogon secure channel connection to a domain controller, using the Netlogon Remote Protocol (MS-NRPC) (Zerologon).
A remote code execution vulnerability exists when the Windows Print Spooler service improperly performs privileged file operations (PrintNightmare).

A remote code execution vulnerability exists when MSDT is called using the URL protocol from a calling application such as Word. Attackers can run arbitrary code with the privileges of the calling application (Follina).
A server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange Server allows an attacker to send arbitrary HTTP requests and authenticate as the Exchange server (ProxyLogon).
A spoofing vulnerability exists in the way Windows CryptoAPI (Crypt32.dll) validates Elliptic Curve Cryptography (ECC) certificates (CurveBall).

Microsoft Office 2007 Service Pack 3, Microsoft Office 2010 Service Pack 2, Microsoft Office 2013 Service Pack 1, and Microsoft Office 2016 allow an attacker to run arbitrary code in the context of the current user by failing to properly handle objects in memory.
MultipartStream.java in Apache Commons FileUpload allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (infinite loop and CPU consumption) via a crafted Content-Type header.
Equation Editor in Microsoft Office allows a remote code execution vulnerability due to the way it handles objects in memory.

Vulnerability in the Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server.
Microsoft Word allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RTF document.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the VBScript engine handles objects in memory, aka 'Windows VBScript Engine Remote Code Execution Vulnerability' (Double Kill).
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the Microsoft Server Message Block 3.1.1 (SMBv3) protocol handles certain requests (SMBGhost).

In Pulse Secure Pulse Connect Secure (PCS) 8.2 before 8.2R12.1, 8.3 before 8.3R7.1, and 9.0 before 9.0R3.4, an unauthenticated remote attacker can send a specially crafted URI to perform an arbitrary file reading vulnerability.
Pulse Connect Secure 9.0R3/9.1R1 and higher is vulnerable to an authentication bypass vulnerability discovered by Mandiant that allows an unauthenticated user to perform remote code execution.
OpenSSH through 7.7 is prone to a user enumeration vulnerability due to not delaying bailout for an invalid authenticating user until after the packet containing the request has been fully parsed.
A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco RV320 and RV325 Dual Gigabit WAN VPN Routers could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to retrieve sensitive information.

A vulnerability in the web services interface of Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) Software and Cisco Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) Software could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to conduct directory traversal attacks.

DrayTek Vigor2960 1.3.1_Beta, Vigor3900 1.4.4_Beta, and Vigor300B 1.3.3_Beta, 1.4.2.1_Beta, and 1.4.4_Beta devices allow remote code execution as root (without authentication) via shell metacharacters to the cgi-bin/mainfunction.cgi URI.

The ngx_http_parse_chunked function in http/ngx_http_parse.c in nginx 1.3.9 through 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or execute arbitrary code via a chunked Transfer-Encoding request with a large chunk size.

The default configuration in Elasticsearch before 1.2.0 enables dynamic scripting, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary MVEL expressions and Java code via the source parameter to _search.

The Groovy scripting engine in Elasticsearch before 1.3.8 and 1.4.x before 1.4.3 allows remote attackers to bypass the sandbox protection mechanism and execute arbitrary shell commands via a crafted script.
The mailSend function in the isMail transport in PHPMailer before 5.2.18 might allow remote attackers to pass extra parameters to the mail command and consequently execute arbitrary code.
Util/PHP/eval-stdin.php in PHPUnit before 4.8.28 and 5.x before 5.6.3 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via HTTP POST data beginning with a '<?php ' substring.
The Fileserver web application in Apache ActiveMQ 5.x before 5.14.0 allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary files via an HTTP PUT followed by an HTTP MOVE request.

The Widget Connector macro in Atlassian Confluence Server allows remote attackers to achieve path traversal and remote code execution on a Confluence Server or Data Center instance via server-side template injection.

A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Exchange Server when the server fails to properly create unique keys at install time. An authenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges.

In affected versions of Confluence Server and Data Center, an OGNL injection vulnerability exists that would allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code on a Confluence Server or Data Center instance.

On F5 BIG-IP, undisclosed requests may bypass iControl REST authentication allowing an unauthenticated attacker with network access to the BIG-IP system through the management port and/or self IP addresses to execute arbitrary system commands.

A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the Windows Remote Procedure Call (RPC) runtime mechanism. An unauthenticated attacker could send a specially crafted RPC call to trigger the vulnerability.

Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. An attacker could send a specially crafted email that forces the victim's client to connect to an attacker-controlled SMB share and transmit NetNTLMv2 hashes.
Office and Windows HTML Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. An attacker could create a specially crafted Microsoft Office document that bypasses the Mark of the Web (MotW) security feature.

Apache Struts versions 2.3 to 2.3.34 and 2.5 to 2.5.16 suffer from possible Remote Code Execution when using results with no namespace and in same time, its upper action(s) have no or wildcard namespace.
The WLS Security component in Oracle WebLogic Server allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a crafted serialized Java object in T3 protocol traffic.

Vulnerability in the Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware (subcomponent: WLS Core Components). Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via T3 to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server.

The isMail transport in PHPMailer before 5.2.20 might allow remote attackers to pass extra parameters to the mail command and consequently execute arbitrary code by leveraging improper interaction between the escapeshellarg function and internal escaping.

A vulnerability was found in libssh's server-side state machine before versions 0.7.6 and 0.8.4. A malicious client could create channels without first performing authentication, resulting in unauthorized access.
In WinRAR through 5.61, there is an Absolute Path Traversal vulnerability in the UNACEV2.DLL library, which allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted ACE archive.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Windows Domain Name System (DNS) servers when they fail to properly handle requests (SIGRed).
Windows Print Spooler Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. Closely related to but distinct from PrintNightmare.

The ssl3_get_key_exchange function in s3_clnt.c in OpenSSL before 0.9.8zd, 1.0.0 before 1.0.0p, and 1.0.1 before 1.0.1k allows remote SSL servers to conduct RSA-to-EXPORT_RSA downgrade attacks (FREAK).

The SSL protocol 3.0, as used in OpenSSL through 1.0.1i and other products, uses nondeterministic CBC padding, which makes it easier for man-in-the-middle attackers to obtain cleartext data via a padding-oracle attack (POODLE).

The SSLv2 protocol, as used in OpenSSL before 1.0.1s and 1.0.2 before 1.0.2g and other products, requires a server to send a ServerVerify message before establishing that a client possesses certain plaintext RSA data, which makes it easier for remote attackers to decrypt TLS ciphertext data (DROWN).
Use after free in Animation in Google Chrome prior to 98.0.4758.102 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page.
A use after free issue was addressed with improved memory management. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to arbitrary code execution in Apple WebKit.

Active Directory Domain Services Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. An authenticated user could manipulate attributes on computer accounts they own or manage, and acquire a certificate from Active Directory Certificate Services.

Microsoft Word Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker could send a malicious email containing an RTF payload that would allow them to gain access to execute commands within the application.
OpenVPN versions 2.1 to 2.4.9 and 2.5.0 allow attackers to cause a denial of service (server crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code by supplying a crafted client certificate.

Windows AppX Installer Spoofing Vulnerability. An attacker could craft a malicious attachment to be used in phishing campaigns. Emotet/Trickbot/Bazaloader family have been observed leveraging this vulnerability.

The Security Account Manager Remote Protocol (SAMR) and Local Security Authority (Domain Policy) (LSAD) protocols in Samba 3.x and 4.x before 4.2.11, 4.3.x before 4.3.8, and 4.4.x before 4.4.2 allow man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof SMB servers (Badlock).
The SMBv1 server in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets, aka 'Windows SMB Remote Code Execution Vulnerability'.
In Sudo before 1.8.28, an attacker with access to a Runas ALL sudoer account can bypass certain policy restrictions by specifying a user ID of -1 or 4294967295.
The iControl REST interface on F5 BIG-IP allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary system commands, create or delete files, and disable services.
An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists in Windows when the Win32k component fails to properly handle objects in memory.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the scripting engine handles objects in memory in Internet Explorer, aka 'Scripting Engine Memory Corruption Vulnerability'.
Microsoft Windows OLE package manager allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted OLE object in a PowerPoint presentation (Sandworm).
A remote code execution vulnerability exists when the Windows TCP/IP stack improperly handles ICMPv6 Router Advertisement packets (Bad Neighbor).

A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the Barracuda Email Security Gateway (appliance) due to improper sanitization of attachments. An attacker can format file names to execute system commands.
An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists when the Windows Background Intelligent Transfer Service (BITS) improperly handles symbolic links.
An insecure deserialization vulnerability exists in the Unified Messaging service of Microsoft Exchange Server, allowing an authenticated attacker to run code as SYSTEM.
A post-authentication arbitrary file write vulnerability exists in Microsoft Exchange Server. This is commonly chained with CVE-2021-26855 (ProxyLogon).
Windows User Profile Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. An attacker could elevate privileges to SYSTEM via directory junction and a symlink.
Microsoft Exchange Server Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability (ProxyNotShell). An authenticated attacker can trigger an SSRF to gain administrative privileges.
Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (ProxyNotShell). Allows an attacker with administrative privileges to execute arbitrary commands.
A command injection vulnerability in VMware Aria Operations for Networks allows a malicious actor with network access to perform remote code execution.

RARLAB WinRAR before 6.23 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code when a user attempts to view a benign file within a ZIP archive containing a maliciously crafted payload alongside a folder with the same name.
Windows Mark of the Web (MotW) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability. An attacker can craft a file to bypass security warnings.
A flaw was found in Eclipse Che where a malicious workspace configuration can lead to privilege escalation and compromise the underlying Kubernetes node.
The Adobe Type Manager Library (ATMFD.DLL) in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted OpenType font.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists when Windows improperly handles shortcut (.lnk) files, aka 'LNK Remote Code Execution Vulnerability'.

Jonathan Looney discovered that the Linux kernel default MSS is hard-coded to 48 bytes. This allows a remote peer to fragment TCP resend queues significantly more than if a larger MSS were enforced, leading to a CPU exhaustion panic (SACK Panic).

Multiple stack-based buffer overflows in the send_vc function in the nss_dns/dns-network.c in the GNU C Library (glibc) allow remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or execute arbitrary code via a crafted DNS response.

The join_session_keyring function in security/keys/process_keys.c in the Linux kernel allows local users to gain privileges or cause a denial of service (integer overflow and use-after-free) via certain prctl operations.

In Docker 19.03.x before 19.03.1, the copy (docker cp) capability allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code on the host if they can convince a victim to run the command against an attacker-controlled container.

The Jakarta Multipart parser in Apache Struts 2 2.3.x before 2.3.32 and 2.5.x before 2.5.10.1 has incorrect exception handling and error-message generation during file-upload attempts, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands.

The Traffic Management User Interface (TMUI) in F5 BIG-IP allows unauthenticated attackers, or authenticated users, with network access to the TMUI, to execute arbitrary system commands, create or delete files, or disable services.
Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (ProxyShell). An unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary commands on Microsoft Exchange Server through port 443.

An issue has been discovered in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions starting from 11.9. GitLab was not properly validating image files that were passed to a file parser which resulted in a remote command execution.

Drupal 7.x and 8.x contain a highly critical vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code because of an issue affecting multiple subsystems with default or common module configurations (Drupalgeddon2).

Race condition in mm/gup.c in the Linux kernel allows local users to gain privileges by leveraging incorrect handling of a copy-on-write (COW) feature to write to a read-only memory mapping (Dirty COW).
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the HTTP protocol stack (HTTP.sys) that is caused when HTTP.sys improperly parses specially crafted HTTP requests (MS15-034).
A path traversal vulnerability in the SSL VPN web portal of FortiOS may allow an unauthenticated attacker to download FortiOS system files through specially crafted HTTP resource requests.

A local privilege escalation vulnerability was found on polkit's pkexec utility. The pkexec application is a setuid tool designed to allow unprivileged users to run commands as privileged users according to predefined policies (PwnKit).

The vSphere Client (HTML5) contains a remote code execution vulnerability in a vCenter Server plugin. A malicious actor with network access to port 443 may exploit this issue to execute commands with unrestricted privileges.
An issue was discovered in Citrix Application Delivery Controller (ADC) and Gateway. It allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform arbitrary code execution.
When using the Apache JServ Protocol (AJP), care must be taken when trusting incoming connections to Apache Tomcat. This allows an attacker to read any files from the web application (Ghostcat).
In Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center, an unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code via an OGNL injection vulnerability.
A Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux application running on JDK 9+ may be vulnerable to remote code execution (RCE) via data binding (Spring4Shell).
GNU Bash processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code (Shellshock).
Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing unauthenticated remote code execution (Log4Shell).
The TLS and DTLS implementations in OpenSSL do not properly handle Heartbeat Extension packets, allowing remote attackers to obtain sensitive information from process memory (Heartbleed).
Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway are vulnerable to sensitive information disclosure allowing attackers to hijack existing authenticated sessions (Citrix Bleed).
A command injection vulnerability in the GlobalProtect feature of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges.
Malicious code injected into the xz tools and libraries allows an attacker to bypass sshd authentication and gain unauthorized root access.
An authentication bypass vulnerability in JetBrains TeamCity allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution on the server.
ConnectWise ScreenConnect is affected by an Authentication Bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain full administrative, unauthenticated access.
A vulnerability in the web UI feature of Cisco IOS XE Software could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to create an account on an affected system with privilege level 15 access.
When using Apache and PHP-CGI on Windows, Windows 'Best-Fit' behavior can replace characters in the command line, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
An SQL injection vulnerability in the MOVEit Transfer web application allows an unauthenticated attacker to gain unauthorized access to the database.
